ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for unique identification of stocks across global markets */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange (e.g., New York, London) */,
  "exchange_type" TEXT /* Type of exchange (e.g., stock, commodity, currency) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for the stock, considering dividends and splits */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, investor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the watchlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive, triggered) */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, in-app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key used to access the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV, database) */,
  "data_update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_data_sources" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the tag is assigned to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., sector, industry, geographic location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_tags_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the sentiment is for */,
  "sentiment_date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Score of the sentiment analysis (e.g., -1.0 to 1.0) */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment analysis (e.g., bullish, bearish, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_source" TEXT /* Source of the sentiment analysis (e.g., news, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sentiments_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that split */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the stock split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that paid the dividend */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend payment */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
